releaseNotes: 修复跨越多个侧栏页面切换时的长时间卡顿：皮肤缩略图改为后台限尺寸解码并使用有上限的内存缓存。统一 Agent 切换、风格、标签、陈列与权益筛选 UI，补齐悬停、选中和窄窗口布局。
releaseNotesEn: Fixes long stalls when jumping across non-adjacent sidebar sections by decoding bounded theme thumbnails off the main thread with a memory-limited cache. Unifies Agent switching and catalog filters with consistent hover, selected, and compact-window states.
